Dentsu’s Jennifer Hungerbuhler says agentic AI is making “dramatic changes” on the agency’s buying and go-to-market strategies when it comes to activating local TV in an exclusive
TVNewsCheck
interview.

About
Michael Depp
Michael Depp has been the editor of TVNewsCheck since November 2019 and is also chief content officer of parent NewsCheckMedia. He’s a past editor of NetNewsCheck and has contributed to NPR’s “All Things Considered,” Reuters, Poets & Writers and a number of other publications and radio shows. Michael is a specialist in how digital disruption is ushering in a sea change in media revenue models, journalism and storytelling. He can be reached at
